feed.indexTagline: Your content. Your vibe. Your rules.

notFound.title: 404 - Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for could not be found.
notFound.heading: This page doesn't exist.

list.seoDescription: Pledge funding for concrete actions, evidence, or outcomes you want to inspire.
list.heroBody: Fund concrete actions, evidence, and outcomes. People reply with submissions, and the community rewards the work that moves the goal forward.
list.loginToCreate: Log in to create a pledge
list.sectionTagline: Help fund the actions worth making.
list.emptyHint: Be the first to create a pledge.
list.emptyHintCountry: Be the first to create a pledge for {{country}}.

card.confirmDelete: Delete this pledge? This cannot be undone.

create.seoDescription: Create a donor pledge to inspire concrete action on {{appName}}.
create.loginGateTitle: Log in to create a pledge
create.loginGateBody: Pledges are signed Nostr events. You need a Nostr login to publish one.
create.heading: Create pledge
create.title: Title
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain the action, evidence, or outcome you want to inspire, what submissions should include, and how you plan to evaluate them...
create.timezoneNote: Start and deadline times will be interpreted in this timezone.
create.errorLoginRequired: You must be logged in to create a pledge.
create.errorPledgeInvalid: Pledge amount must be a positive USD amount.
create.errorPriceUnavailable: Waiting for BTC/USD price to calculate the pledge amount.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Cover image must be a valid https:// URL.
create.errorDeadlinePast: Deadline cannot be in the past.

detail.submissionPlaceholder: Share proof, evidence, or completed work...
detail.noSubmissionsHint: Be the first to reply with proof, evidence, or completed work.
detail.trustNote: This pledge is trust-based. Funding progress sums zaps and donation receipts on top-level submissions.
detail.storyEmpty: The pledger hasn't written details for this pledge yet.

list.seoDescription: Discover and join groups on Nostr
list.heroBody: Create groups, gather members, and keep up with what your spaces are doing.
list.createGroupLoginTitle: Log in to create a group
list.createGroupLoginBody: Creating a group publishes a Nostr event from your account.
list.loginToSeeTitle: Log in to see your groups
list.loginToSeeBody: Groups you've founded or moderate will appear here.
list.noGroupsBody: Create your own group to start coordinating campaigns, pledges, and events with your people.
list.noFeaturedBody: {{appName}} moderators feature standout groups here. Check back soon.
list.needsReviewDesc: {{appName}} groups that haven't been featured or hidden yet. Lift one into the Featured shelf or suppress it with Hide.
list.hiddenDesc: Groups suppressed from public discovery. Use the kebab menu on a card to unhide.

create.loginGateTitle: Log in to start a group
create.loginGateBody: Groups are signed Nostr events. You need a Nostr login to publish one.
create.invalidEditBody: This group edit link is missing a valid group address.
create.cannotEditBody: Only the founder of this group can update it.
create.name: Name
create.errorLoginRequired: You must be logged in to create a group.
create.errorEditLoadFailed: Group could not be loaded for editing.
create.errorEditNotOwner: Only the group founder can edit this group.
create.errorNameInvalid: Name must include letters or numbers so a group URL can be created.
create.errorEditLatestMissing: Could not find the latest version of this group to update.
create.errorCoverInvalid: Cover image must be a valid https:// URL.
create.errorSlugCollision: You already have a group with the identifier "{{slug}}". Choose another name.

campaignsCreate.loginGateTitle: Log in to start a campaign
campaignsCreate.loginGateBody: Campaigns are signed Nostr events. You need a Nostr login to publish one.
campaignsCreate.invalidEditBody: This campaign edit link is missing a valid campaign address.
campaignsCreate.cannotEditBody: Only the author of this campaign can update it.
campaignsCreate.title: Title
campaignsCreate.customWalletIntro: Enter a Bitcoin address, a silent-payment code, or both. At least one is required.
campaignsCreate.onchainInvalid: Not a recognized mainnet Bitcoin address (bc1q… / bc1p…).
campaignsCreate.spInvalid: Not a recognized BIP-352 silent-payment code (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.summaryPlaceholder: Help our neighborhood legal clinic defend peaceful protesters.
campaignsCreate.storyPlaceholder: Share the background, who benefits, and how funds will be used.
campaignsCreate.goalNote: Whole US Dollars. Donors pay in Bitcoin; clients estimate the USD-equivalent at view time.
campaignsCreate.errorLoginRequired: You must be logged in to create a campaign.
campaignsCreate.errorEditLoadFailed: Campaign could not be loaded for editing.
campaignsCreate.errorEditNotOwner: Only the campaign author can edit this campaign.
campaignsCreate.errorTitleInvalid: Title must include letters or numbers so a campaign URL can be created.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugInvalid: Identifier must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
campaignsCreate.errorHdUnavailable: Built-in wallet is unavailable for this login.
campaignsCreate.errorSpUnavailable: Silent-payment address is unavailable for this login.
campaignsCreate.errorOnchainInvalid: The on-chain address is not a recognized mainnet bech32(m) address (bc1q… / bc1p…).
campaignsCreate.errorSpInvalid: The silent-payment code is not a recognized BIP-352 code (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.errorWalletRequired: Provide at least one wallet endpoint — a Bitcoin mainnet address (bc1q… / bc1p…) or a silent-payment code (sp1…).
campaignsCreate.errorGoalInvalid: Goal must be a positive whole-dollar amount.
campaignsCreate.errorDeadlinePast: Deadline cannot be in the past.
campaignsCreate.errorDeadlineInvalid: Deadline is not a valid date.
campaignsCreate.errorEditLatestMissing: Could not find the latest version of this campaign to update.
campaignsCreate.errorSlugCollision: You already have a campaign with the identifier "{{slug}}". Choose another.
campaignsCreate.errorBannerInvalid: Banner must be a valid https:// URL.
campaignsCreate.errorHdDeriveFailed: Could not derive a fresh on-chain address from your wallet.
campaignsCreate.errorHdDeriveInvalid: Derived wallet address failed validation. Please add a custom address instead.
campaignsCreate.errorPublishedInvalid: Published event failed validation. Please refresh and try again.

campaignsDetail.deletedToastDesc: A deletion request was published. Well-behaved relays will drop the campaign from feeds.
campaignsDetail.noCommentsHint: Be the first to leave a message of support.
campaignsDetail.deleteDialogBody: This publishes a NIP-09 deletion request. Well-behaved relays will drop the campaign from feeds and direct links. Past donation receipts stay on-chain regardless. This action cannot be undone — to keep accepting donations, edit the campaign instead.
campaignsDetail.storyEmpty: The organizer hasn't written a story for this campaign yet.

home.heroBody: Raise Bitcoin directly from supporters around the world. Every donation settles straight to your wallet, with no middlemen, no chargebacks, and no platform holding your funds.
home.communityDesc: Help fund the changes worth making.
home.pendingDesc: Campaigns on the network that no Team Soapbox moderator has approved or hidden yet.
home.hiddenDesc: Campaigns suppressed from the public homepage. Use the kebab menu on a card to unhide.
home.yourCampaignsDesc: Your campaigns are live on Nostr and donations work via the campaign link. They appear on the homepage once a Team Soapbox moderator approves them.
home.emptyHint: Be the first to start a fundraiser on {{appName}}. Tell your story, choose your beneficiaries, and share the link.

all.title: All Campaigns
all.description: Browse every campaign published on Agora.
all.noMatchHint: Try a different search term, or clear the search to see every campaign.
all.allHiddenHint: Every campaign on the network has been hidden by moderators. Toggle “Show hidden” to view them.
all.emptyHint: No campaigns have been published yet. Be the first.

settings.title: Settings

sections.profileDesc: Display name, bio, avatar, and verification.
sections.languageDesc: Choose the language used throughout the app.
sections.networkDesc: Data usage, relays, and file upload servers.
sections.organizersDesc: Appoint country organizers who can pin posts to country feeds.

settings.loginRequired: You need to be signed in to manage organizers.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Choose how the app looks.
appearance.intro: Pick your preferred color mode. System will automatically match your device's light or dark setting.

network.title: Network
network.subtitle: Manage data usage, relays, and file upload servers.
network.connectionsIntro: Manage your relay connections. Relays are servers that store and distribute Nostr events across the network.
network.reduceDataUsageDesc: For metered or slow connections. Videos won't autoplay, background video previews are skipped, and images wait for a tap before loading.
network.useImageProxyDesc: Fetches smaller WebP versions of images instead of full-resolution originals.
network.proxyApiDesc: Must speak the <0>wsrv.nl / weserv</0> API. Self-hosters can point this at their own instance.
network.uploadQualityDesc: Compressed resizes large images and picks the smallest format. Original uploads images exactly as-is.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options for power users.
advanced.intro: Wallet connections, system configuration, and other advanced options.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language used throughout the app.
language.intro: Select your preferred language. The app will switch immediately and remember your choice on this device.
language.translationNote: Translations are a work in progress. Untranslated text falls back to English.

organizers.appointDesc: Grant a user permission to pin posts on a specific country feed.
organizers.alreadyOrganizer: This user is already an organizer for that country
organizers.adminRequiredDesc: Only platform admins can appoint or remove organizers.

wallet.seoDescription: Hierarchical-deterministic Bitcoin wallet derived from your Nostr nsec.

loggedOut.title: Bitcoin Wallet
loggedOut.description: A hierarchical wallet derived from your Nostr identity. Fresh address per receive, full transaction history, no address reuse.
loggedOut.requiresNsec: Requires login with an nsec (your Nostr private key).

unsupported.title: Wallet unavailable
unsupported.extension: Your browser extension keeps your secret key isolated, so we can't derive child keys for your wallet.
unsupported.bunker: Your remote signer (NIP-46 bunker) keeps your secret key on the bunker side, so we can't derive child keys for your wallet.
unsupported.other: Your login type doesn't expose the secret key needed to derive your wallet.
unsupported.instructions: Log out and sign in again with your nsec to use the wallet.

receiveDialog.title: Receive Bitcoin
receiveDialog.description: Share an address to receive bitcoin.
receiveDialog.onChainIntro: Fresh address each time. Bump to a new index after sharing for privacy.
receiveDialog.silentIntro: Static receive identifier. Share once and reuse forever — senders derive a unique on-chain address per payment.
receiveDialog.noIndexer: Scanning disabled — no BIP-352 indexer configured. Set <0>bip352IndexerUrl</0> in your app config to detect incoming silent payments.

tx.silentDetectedTitle: Detected via BIP-352 silent payment scan

walletRecovery.seoDescription: Recover funds from a previous Lightning wallet and transfer them to your Nostr-derived Bitcoin address.
walletRecovery.title: Recover Old Wallet
walletRecovery.heading: Recover your old wallet
walletRecovery.subheading: If you previously held funds in the Lightning wallet, you can sweep them to your Nostr-derived Bitcoin address. Your old wallet is not restored — this is a one-time, one-way transfer.

loggedOut.title: Log in to recover
loggedOut.description: Log in with the Nostr identity that owned the old Lightning wallet so the funds can be swept to its Bitcoin address.

phrase.title: Recovery phrase
phrase.description: Paste the 12-word recovery phrase from your old wallet.
phrase.checkingRelays: Checking your relays for an encrypted backup…
phrase.backupFoundDesc: We found an encrypted backup of your old wallet's recovery phrase published from this account.
phrase.warning: Only paste a recovery phrase you trust. Anyone with this phrase can spend the funds. After the sweep completes, delete it from any place you copied it from.
phrase.sweepButton: Sweep funds to my Bitcoin address

sweeping.dontClose: Don't close this tab. This can take up to a minute while the old wallet syncs and the transaction is broadcast.

success.title: Recovery complete
success.sent: Sent {{sats}} sats to your Bitcoin address.

errors.noNip44: Your signer does not support NIP-44 decryption, which is required to read the relay backup. Paste your 12-word recovery phrase manually instead.
errors.decryptFailed: Could not decrypt the relay backup. Paste your 12-word recovery phrase manually instead.
errors.invalidWordCount: Recovery phrase must be 12 or 24 words.
errors.noBalance: Your old wallet has no spendable balance. There is nothing to recover.

toast.backupLoadedDesc: Recovery phrase decrypted from your relays.

walletConnect.helpText: Install a WebLN browser extension or connect a NWC wallet to send zaps.

empty.title: No wallets connected
empty.description: Add an NWC connection to enable instant zaps.

dialog.title: Connect NWC Wallet
dialog.description: Paste a connection string from your NWC-compatible wallet.

toast.uriRequiredDesc: Please enter a valid NWC connection URI.
toast.activeChangedDesc: The selected wallet is now active for zaps.

recipient.label: Recipient
recipient.sendingSp: Sending via a silent payment — the recipient gets a fresh, unlinkable on-chain address.
recipient.sendingNostr: Sending to a Nostr user's on-chain address.
recipient.sendingRaw: Sending to a raw Bitcoin address.

errors.unavailable: HD wallet is not available for this login type.
errors.enterRecipient: Enter a Bitcoin address, sp1… address, or npub.
errors.noSpendable: No spendable Bitcoin in this wallet.
errors.insufficient: Not enough Bitcoin for this amount + network fee.
errors.noneYet: You don't have any Bitcoin yet.
errors.acknowledgePrivacy: Acknowledge the privacy warning before sending.

bitcoinPublic.lead: Money you send is public and can be traced back to you.
bitcoinPublic.body: Bitcoin is a public ledger. Transactions you send can be traced back to you forever, even after being exchanged by multiple people. Send it only to those you wish to support publicly.
bitcoinPublic.bodyWithCashOut: Bitcoin is a public ledger. Transactions you send can be traced back to you forever, even after being exchanged by multiple people. Send it only to those you wish to support publicly, or cash out at an exchange.
bitcoinPublic.iUnderstand: I understand this transaction is public.

spScan.title: Scan for silent payments
spScan.description: Walks the configured BIP-352 indexer block-by-block to detect incoming silent payments.
spScan.includeSpentDesc: Also detect silent payments that have since been spent. Use when rebuilding receive history after a missed scan or a reset.

reconcile.title: Reconcile spent UTXOs
reconcile.description: Checks each stored silent-payment UTXO against Blockbook and removes any that have been spent. Use this if the balance is higher than it should be after a send.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.loginPrompt: Log in to see your notifications.

notifSettings.title: Notifications
notifSettings.subtitle: Customize which notifications you receive.

enablePush.label: Enable Push Notifications
enablePush.description: Receive notifications for activity on your posts

notifSettings.unsupported: Your browser does not support push notifications.
notifSettings.denied: Notifications are blocked. Update your browser settings to allow notifications from this site.

deliveryMethod.heading: Delivery Method
deliveryMethod.intro: Choose how notifications are delivered to your device.

push.label: Push
push.description: Standard notifications. No persistent status bar icon.

persistent.label: Persistent
persistent.description: Polls relays directly in the background for new notifications. Use this for reliable delivery on devices without push notification support.

onlyFollowing.label: Only from people I follow
onlyFollowing.description: Hide notifications from accounts you don't follow

reactions.label: Reactions
reactions.description: When someone reacts to your posts

zaps.label: Zaps
zaps.description: When someone sends you a lightning or on-chain zap

mentions.label: Mentions
mentions.description: When someone mentions you in a note

comments.label: Comments & Replies
comments.description: When someone comments on or replies to your posts

badges.label: Badge Awards
badges.description: When someone awards you a badge

letters.label: Letters
letters.description: When someone sends you a letter
